title: Personal Portfolio
description: A portfolio built to document projects and major milestones in my coding journey.

title: ETLR Hackathon - CareerFlow Pipeline
description: Built an automated job matching and CV optimisation pipeline using ETLR's event ingestion engine. Integrated a Discord bot UI with Claude to deliver daily tailored job alerts, generate custom CVs, and upgrade resumes.

title: Alacrity Hackathon
description: As a team, we built a chrome extension to intercept web traffic and alert users of professionally unsafe AI tools.

title: UKSEDS Rover Trials Project
description: Built a prototype rover capable of traversing Martian terrain. Included streaming live video feed.

title: NLP Hackathon
description: Utilised an OpenAI API to create a tool that analyses public sentiment of various companies to return graphs and investment recommendations.

title: A-Level Gym Site
description: Gym booking system, alongside other features including reviews page and personal fitness recommendations. Made for A-Level coursework

title: CherryOnTop Desserts POS System
description: My first full stack project, originally built as a complete Point of Sale system for a dessert shop.
